caption: AuthGate full-screen (anonymous flag cleared). gate_visible=True, app-shell present=False — gate covers the app.
After clicking 'Continue without saving': AuthGate dismissed, main app shell visible (map + chat + panels). Anonymous flag persisted to localStorage.
CasesPanel populated with 3 Cases (Ian Fort Myers, Big Cypress, CA wildfire). DOM rows=3.
Case-open envelope rehydrated: chat shows 4 messages (user + agent), Big Cypress raster + panther vector layer loaded, map jumped to case bbox.

Case 1 headline — z11 dark theme with flood-depth raster, WDPA Big Cypress polygon, and 3 distinct per-species GBIF point layers (panther/spoonbill/alligator). Each species styled by `species_*` preset → palette hash for stable distinct colours.
Same camera (z11, Big Cypress) — all overlay layers hidden. Basemap-only alignment proof per job-0086 codified lesson.

Pelicun damage choropleth at z13 dark theme — 20 footprint polygons over Fort Myers, single-colour vector fill (palette-derived) plus flood raster context. NOTE: per-feature ds_mean colour-grading would require a vector-preset registry that style-presets.ts does not yet expose; current rendering uses a single damage_loss_ratio palette colour. Surfaced as OQ-0142-PELICUN-CHOROPLETH-GRADIENT.
SecretsPanel populated with 2 entries (eBird + IUCN Red List), revoke action per row.
Mode2OfferModal at confidence 0.9 — water.weather.gov AHPS Inundation source, .gov accent, 4 detected-pattern chips.
PayloadWarningInline card surfaced via the job-0140 __grace2InjectPayloadWarning dev seam: fetch_goes_satellite 150 MB > 25 MB threshold; Proceed/Cancel/Narrow-scope actions visible.
Case 1 vectors in LIGHT theme — same three species + WDPA polygon over QGIS Server OSM basemap. Continuity check that theme toggle does not regress vector overlays.
